rationale: T5 is the inverse of this fixture: same product-shaped workspace, but HELIX_METHODOLOGY=helix-infra is set in env. The env override MUST win over the repo-shape signal — ADR lands at docs/adr/, NOT docs/helix/02-design/. T7's expected/ mentions HELIX_METHODOLOGY as a banner option but no fixture EXERCISES the env. Without this fixture an impl can fail to honor the env and still pass the matrix.
